PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?athlete ?name WHERE {
  ?subevent wdt:P147 wd:Q1810896 ; rdfs:label ?subeventLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?subeventLabel) = 'en' && CONTAINS(?subeventLabel , 'Men\'s Greco-Roman +100 kg'))
  .
  ?subevent wdt:P166 ?medal ; wdt:P1545 ?athlete .
  ?athlete rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(lang(?name) = 'en')
  .
  ?athlete wdt:P106 wd:Q1272660 ; wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  ?athlete wdt:P1306 ?europeanTitle .
  ?europeanTitle wdt:P585 ?year .
  FILTER(1977 <= ?year && ?year <= 1986)
  .
  ?europeanTitle wdt:P31 wd:Q1899163 .
  ?athlete wdt:P1306 ?europeanTitle2 .
  ?europeanTitle2 wdt:P585 ?year2 .
  FILTER(1977 <= ?year2 && ?year2 <= 1986)
  .
  ?europeanTitle2 wdt:P31 wd:Q1899163 .
}
GROUP BY ?athlete ?name
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?europeanTitle) >= 5)
